metadata.name: Application Support - Google Workspace Sync Issue

description: A user reports that their Google Drive is not syncing files from their desktop.

nodes.task_description: Check the Google Workspace status dashboard for any known issues.

expected_outcome.value: The technician confirms there are no widespread issues with Google Drive.

nodes.task_description: Guide the user to pause and resume syncing in the Google Drive desktop client.

expected_outcome.value: This simple step does not resolve the issue.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the user to sign out of the Google Drive client, and then sign back in to force a re-authentication and re-sync.

expected_outcome.value: This action resolves the sync issue, and files begin syncing correctly.
